To procure a principal contractor to carry out various alterations and refurbishment works to provide a Soft Play and Sensory area and make minor amendments to the toilets for the existing SEND pupils, along with enhancing the security fencing in the school.

title: Digital Mental Health Service
description: The services to be provided for under this contract are Digital Mental Health Services. We are intending to award a contract to an existing provider, following the Provider Selection Regime (PSR) Direct Award Process C. The approximate lifetime value of the contract is £749,325. The contract term runs from 01 April 2026 until 31 March 2028 with an extension option of 12 months.

title: UKRI-5189 EODH Platform Stability and DevOps Enhancement
description: This contract is for Earth Observation Data Hub (EODH) Platform Stability and DevOps Enhancement services for STFC RAL

title: TSM survey
description: To undertake an independent resident survey to collect Tenant Satisfaction Measures (TSM) and help DAMHA meet regulatory requirements. The survey will provide DAMHA with insight into the how satisfied residents are with their homes and the services provided by their landlord.

title: Big Creative Academy - Tender for combined security and cleaning services
description: Big Creative Academy are looking for a single supplier to provide combined security and cleaning services for a for 3 year contract commencing 1 August 2026. Option of 2 x 12-month contract extensions. This is for 1 site only and the contract is currently outsourced.

title: PAHT - Supply & Installation of Replacement UPS Batteries
description: Supply & Installation of Replacement UPS Batteries at Princess Alexandra Hospital. Sub-threshold direct award. Awarded via waiver in line with Trust SFI's.
organisation: The Princess Alexandra Hospital NHS Trust
